blocks.content: A concept symbolizing infinity, typically depicted as a snake eating its own tail and growing.
Even if it continues to swallow its tail, the body grows accordingly, so there is no end.
However.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'll devour it all!
Shirone's teeth violently bit and chewed the tail, giving Gyorgi no chance to recover.

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: Groooar!
Gyorgi, with veins bulging in his neck, tried to amplify his evil power with all his might, but...

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's impossible.
It was extremely impossible to overturn the inertia from the already destroyed balance.
Perhaps an understanding of infinity.
The technical difference between Gyorgi, who was born with it, and Shirone, who experienced it from nothing to everything.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Just that much.
But that one difference collapses the balance and creates a cosmic gap.
Gyorgi no longer struggled.
As the cycle of 20,000 iterations proceeded in an instant, the light completely purified the darkness.

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: Ahhh! Falling!
The citizens who were floating in the air fell to the ground, and all the dust in the city poured down.
Fwoosh.
In the landscape dressed in gray, as if snow had piled up, Shirone twisted his body.
The Miracle Stream that swallowed the darkness circled around and slowly dissipated.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Give up, Gyorgi. You can imitate my current self, but you can't imitate my experiences.

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: That's right. I already know that I can't defeat Yahweh with straightforward methods. Maybe even more than you.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Then why?

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: Gyorgi, who expanded his senses, realized that Mio no longer existed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Well... let's say it's part of a strategy. And I wanted to clash at least once.

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: Once?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I don't quite understand. Do you think I'll give you two chances?

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: Don't be mistaken, Yahweh.
Gyorgi opened the Devil's Bible.

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: This Bible is the only one in the underworld and is the source of all my abilities.
The pages turned by themselves.

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: I don't have Hexa in the first place. The ability to confront you is only in Markina Chapter 16, Verse 5. And so chaos willingly becomes the shadow of God, trampled under God's feet, endlessly imitating his form.
Shirone noted that the Bible had thousands of pages.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes, as you guessed. The Devil's Bible contains many abilities. Of course, not as many as you.
Hexa contained infinite possibilities.

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: What do you want to say? So... you're going to use all your skills to confront me?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's one of the possibilities. If you don't agree to the deal.
Gyorgi held up a page.

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: If you let me go, I'll destroy this ability in front of you. To add, the ability to imitate Hexa is only in Markina Chapter 16, Verse 5.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Destroy it? It's probably the most crucial ability that allowed you to become the leader of the Catacombs.
If it were Shirone's demon, it wouldn't lie.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: And it's not a bad proposal.
Even if you can gain an advantage in the Taiji, it's certainly troublesome if the opponent can imitate Hexa.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: On the other hand, if you destroy Markina Chapter 16, Verse 5, you can actively respond no matter what the opponent does.
Shirone's eyes calmed down.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This guy... really resembles me.

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: From the beginning, he calculated everything and jumped in. The fact that he could make a deal if he failed in a power struggle, and that I would accept this proposal...

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It was impossible without deeply understanding Yahweh. That's why it was bitter.

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: If he can think and judge like me... can't he understand my heart too?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It seems you've had enough time to think? Now it's time to make a decision. The choice is yours.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Anyway, it's a bluff.
Reading each other's thoughts was too easy.
After being lost in thought for a long time, Shirone took a deep breath and spoke.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is the last time. There won't be a second.

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: ...Deal.
With a snap, the page of Chapter 16, Verse 5 was torn.

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: Remember, Yahweh. You may be stronger than me, but evil always wins over good.
Shirone quickly grabbed the paper flying in the wind as the departing enemy watched.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The Devil's Bible.
The verses of Markina Chapter 16 reflected in Shirone's sad eyes.
Gyorgi, who left the city, found someone waiting 20 meters ahead.

blocks.speaker: Gultan
blocks.content: Are you alive?

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: It was Gultan, a member of the Catacombs. He had changed into new clothes, but couldn't hide the scars from burns on his face and hands.

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: ...Not exactly a welcoming tone.
Gultan stood beside him, but Gyorgi didn't even glance at him and moved forward.

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: No, it's fortunate that you prevented a complete retreat. I just... didn't think you'd be alive.

blocks.speaker: Gultan
blocks.content: Hmph, from that human girl.
Honestly, it was close.
The range within which Gultan could move in a quantum state was only about 100 meters.
To escape the mountain that Amy was burning down, he made seven retries.
The total exposure time to the heat was less than a second, but it was still a near-fatal burn.

blocks.speaker: Gultan
blocks.content: I need treatment.
Even as Gultan limped and followed, Gyorgi didn't slow down.
There was no camaraderie among demons, but Gultan felt bad for a different reason.

blocks.speaker: Gultan
blocks.content: By the way, what happened to Gyorgi? Didn't you meet Yahweh?

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: I did. He's strong.
Gyorgi's condition was too intact to say he had fought a fierce battle.

blocks.speaker: Gultan
blocks.content: Is that really all? Didn't you deliberately avoid the fight?

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: What do you mean?

blocks.speaker: Gultan
blocks.content: Yahweh is certainly strong. But he should know how to win over good with evil.

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: Do I hate Yahweh?
If an existence became two, they would do everything to kill each other.
To become the only real one.

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: But can that be called hatred?

blocks.speaker: Gyorgi
blocks.content: It's just a retreat for perfection. Gather all the members of the Catacombs within three days. We need to revise our strategy.

blocks.speaker: Gultan
blocks.content: Understood.
Gultan was still suspicious but didn't have the courage to push Gyorgi further.
Using spatial movement, Amy, Caden, and Maya landed in front of Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What happened to Gyorgi?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: For now... it's like a draw. We don't have to worry for a while.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: A draw?
Can that be a conclusion against demons?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Anyway, it seems to have worked out.
Seeing Maya and Caden standing side by side, Shirone roughly guessed the situation.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: Sorry, I got you involved in something dangerous. I have no face to see you and Amy.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: It's okay. I'm just glad you're safe.

blocks.speaker: Caden
blocks.content: Shirone, I...
As soon as he was within range, Caden's right arm flew towards Shirone's face.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What?
Shirone, who tilted his head, asked.

blocks.speaker: Caden
blocks.content: That...
After hearing the situation from Amy, Shirone nodded.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's like Alien Hand Syndrome.
As if it were a lie, Caden's right hand calmed down, and he turned back with shining eyes.

blocks.speaker: Caden
blocks.content: Alien Hand?

It's a problem that occurs in the brain's information processing stage. In the past, it was mistakenly called that because it was thought to be possessed by a god. Most of it is known to be caused by trauma.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's common for emotions to change the body. But for the mechanism of the thought circuit to change...
Shirone could understand the level of stress Caden had experienced at that moment.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's go to Vashka for an examination. I'll also look for a treatment method with Seriel.

blocks.speaker: Caden
blocks.content: No, I like it as it is now. If I can protect Maya, I can give up anything.
Maya's face turned bright red.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Miracle Stream.
The light smoke gathered into two in the air and permeated Caden and Maya's heads.
Huff!
As the light of Agape settled in their hearts, hot tears flowed down Maya's cheeks.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: Ah...
It was Shirone's love.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: For the time being, emotional illness won't manifest. But there's a condition. I need your help, Maya and Caden.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: I'll do anything I can. No, I'll do even what I can't.
Seeing Maya, who had regained her vitality in front of Shirone, Caden felt a pang in his heart.

blocks.speaker: Caden
blocks.content: I can't make Maya smile.

blocks.speaker: Caden
blocks.content: The reason his right arm was still might be because he couldn't even be jealous of Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Caden
blocks.content: Don't be greedy.
Just because he found a way to protect her didn't mean he escaped fate.

blocks.speaker: Caden
blocks.content: If I get obsessed, Maya will be in danger. Just think about protecting her safely.
Putting personal feelings aside, Shirone and his party left the city for their next mission.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Take Maya to Vashka. I'll be waiting at the palace.

blocks.speaker: Caden
blocks.content: Don't worry. Maya will be safe.
Probably, but Shirone was more worried about Caden.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's not time to reveal it yet. It's better this way for now.
The fate of the Red Cross Star, the true meaning contained in its law, was told by the history of Omega.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. See you in the capital.
Caden, who had escaped fate, drew his sword with his right hand and initiated spatial movement with Maya.
Screeeech!
The noise of spatial movement, which had been fading into the end of the sky, returned with the flash.

blocks.speaker: Arnold Lampa
blocks.content: Huh?
An old man with a benevolent face, hiding intense eyes, appeared with his hands behind his back.

blocks.speaker: Arnold Lampa
blocks.content: Mr. Lampa.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Your Excellency.
The reason he, who was handling numerous matters, sought out Shirone and Amy's party was one.

blocks.speaker: Arnold Lampa
blocks.content: We have found Wena Wizard.
The only person with the purity to oppose Habitz as a natural awakener.

blocks.speaker: Arnold Lampa
blocks.content: So, they were alive.

blocks.speaker: Arnold Lampa
blocks.content: Yes. They are currently in the Kingdom of Stang. The Ten Mages of the Underworld are simultaneously monitoring and guarding them.
The System Inspection Department had five 1-star residents and an equal number of satellites.
These were called the Ten Mages of the Underworld, and unlike other stars, they were trained by Freed.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Finally, a full-fledged mission. What kind of child is wizard? It's a girl, right? Is she cute?

blocks.speaker: Arnold Lampa
blocks.content: Well...

blocks.speaker: Arnold Lampa
blocks.content: Well, yes.
